title: 3D Dropped Item StationAPI
description: render dropped item as 3D for StationAPI b1.7.3
body:
A simple mod for beta 1.7.3 that render dropped item as 3D as it was in release 1.4.6

Require [Babric](https://babric.github.io/)

This mod also support StationAPI Arsenic's Item Renderer aswell along with Apron's Custom Item Texture Atlas

![Dropped Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14eddfe08f0e8191c7b1a2c9eacdfae848e76e28.png)
